inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 ongoing diluted EPS $3.80 (10-K Non-GAAP); GAAP diluted EPS $3.42 after $287M Marshall wildfire charge at PSCo
inputs.dividend_source: FY2025 dividends declared $2.28 per share (+4% vs $2.19 in 2024); 10-K stockholders equity roll-forward
inputs.normalization_note: Regulated utility: Lawrence uses ongoing earnings power per share, not OCF minus total capital spending. Base capex $60B (2026-2030) is recovered through rate-base mechanisms; $7B equity issuance planned.

growth_explanation.mechanism: Rate-base growth from $60B five-year base capital plan (electric transmission, renewables, distribution, generation) plus data-center and large-load interconnections (Google Minnesota agreement Q1 2026); 2026 ongoing EPS guidance $4.04-$4.16.
growth_explanation.years_1_5: 6% owner-cash growth from authorized capital recovery and load growth
growth_explanation.source: 10-K FY2025 base capital forecast; Q1 2026 10-Q Google data-center service agreement

bear.notes: Wildfire/regulatory lag, Colorado ROE pressure, equity dilution from $7B issuance, affordability pushback

base.notes: Execute $60B capex plan; ongoing EPS toward $4.10+; dividend grows 4-6% annually

bull.notes: Faster data-center load conversion, constructive Colorado/MISO transmission outcomes, minimal dilution via forward equity

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Regulated rate-base assets on balance sheet; no land-at-cost pattern

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: Integrated regulated wires and generation; no royalty trust

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: PSCo GAAP ROE 5.66% vs system average; Marshall wildfire $287M charge in 2025 — ongoing earnings normalize

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Google Minnesota data-center electric service agreement (Q1 2026 10-Q) flows through rate-base growth, not separate option

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: Marshall wildfire settlement ($287M charge) is one-time; regulatory recovery timing uncertain

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Renewables and transmission additions earn through state riders and formula rates
